events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947, and is known for his iconic sound and songwriting.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Brian May, who turns 79 today. His guitar work with Queen shaped generations of rock music.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Six decades of rock and still moving like Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, originally Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV changed everything? 45 years ago today, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era of music television.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, defining the sound of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival turns 57
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly defining moment in history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year, born in 1935.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the one and only King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley. His legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year, born in 1942.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. His music remains as electrifying as ever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road,' was released on September 26, 1969, and featured that iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The album that gave us *that* legendary cover. 'Abbey Road' from The Beatles is 57 years old. Still sounds fresh.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde. A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock Star Swagger
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. The swagger, the voice, the legend.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK to promote the 'Shaved Fish' compilation on October 24, 1975, following its US single release in 1971.

angles.name: Timeless Message
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' became a beacon of hope. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and released it on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? It's 25 years since Apple introduced the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to 007 and his incredible cinematic legacy. What's your favourite Bond theme?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The iconic singer-songwriter and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His songs continue to inspire generations for peace and understanding.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British actor, comedian, and screenwriter John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
